extDescription.message: AI summary of a game's recent Steam reviews, shown directly on its store page.

optionsEndpointHintFoundry.message: Your resource URL, e.g. https://RESOURCE-NAME.services.ai.azure.com/anthropic/ — the model below is the deployment name.

optionsEndpointHintAzureOpenAI.message: Your Azure AI Foundry OpenAI v1 endpoint, e.g. https://RESOURCE-NAME.openai.azure.com/openai/v1 — the model below is the deployment name.

optionsEndpointHintLocal.message: OpenAI-compatible endpoint of your local server (Ollama: http://localhost:11434/v1). API key can stay empty.

optionsEndpointRequired.message: Endpoint is required for this profile type

optionsPermissionDenied.message: Permission denied for the endpoint: the profile cannot work without it

optionsApiKeyHint.message: Your personal key, stored only in this browser and sent only to the profile's endpoint.

optionsModelHint.message: Model ID (e.g. claude-opus-4-8) or deployment name on Azure AI Foundry.

optionsAutoGenerate.message: Generate automatically when the page opens (each visited page costs one API call)

panelIdleHint.message: AI summary of recent reviews, generated with your own API key.

panelDisclosure.message: AI-generated summary based on $1 recent user reviews. Not official Steam content.

panelMissingKey.message: Set up a provider profile with an API key in the options to generate the summary.

panelGenericError.message: Summary unavailable. Try again in a moment.

optionsWeightsHint.message: Values 0–1; they are normalized automatically, only their ratio matters.

optionsPresetNameRequired.message: Choose a name for the preset

tipMode.message: Hybrid (recommended): merges the most helpful reviews within the date range with the most recent ones, then ranks with the weights below. Recent + scoring: starts from recent reviews only and ranks with the weights. Steam native: uses Steam's own helpfulness ranking, no weights.

tipNumReviews.message: How many reviews are sent to the model. More reviews = more representative summary but higher cost per generation (~200-300 tokens each).

tipDayRange.message: Time window for the "most helpful" component (Hybrid and Steam native modes). It does not limit the "most recent" reviews.

tipMinChars.message: Reviews shorter than this are discarded before selection (filters contentless "+1" reviews).

tipWeightHelpfulness.message: How much Steam's helpfulness score matters (other users' "helpful" votes). Unvoted reviews are not penalized.

tipWeightPlaytime.message: How much the reviewer's hours played matter: more hours = more grounded experience.

tipWeightSubstance.message: How much text length matters: favors substantial reviews over short quips.

tipWeightFreshness.message: How much recency matters: favors the newest reviews within the date range.
